'''dhadhusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephaloduroarteriosynangiosis|encephaloduroarteriosynangiosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephaloduroarteriosynangiosis|encephaloduroarteriosynangiosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædhisith|dhædhisith]] || [[word:dhædhisij|dhædhisij]] || [[word:dhædhisish|dhædhisish]] || [[word:dhædhisi|dhædhisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadhudhusuth|dhadhudhusuth]] || [[word:dhadhudhusuj|dhadhudhusuj]] || [[word:dhadhudhusush|dhadhudhusush]] || [[word:dhadhudhusu|dhadhudhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadhusuth|dhadhusuth]] || [[word:dhadhusuj|dhadhusuj]] || [[word:dhadhusush|dhadhusush]] || [[word:dhadhusu|dhadhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadhufsuth|dhadhufsuth]] || [[word:dhadhufsuj|dhadhufsuj]] || [[word:dhadhufsush|dhadhufsush]] || [[word:dhadhufsuf|dhadhufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadhusuthu|dhadhusuthu]] || [[word:dhadhusuju|dhadhusuju]] || [[word:dhadhusushu|dhadhusushu]] || [[word:dhadhusuku|dhadhusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadhusuth|dhadhusuth]] || [[word:dhadhusuj|dhadhusuj]] || [[word:dhadhusush|dhadhusush]] || [[word:dhadhusu|dhadhusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadhusuthul|dhadhusuthul]] || [[word:dhadhusujul|dhadhusujul]] || [[word:dhadhusushul|dhadhusushul]] || [[word:dhadhusukul|dhadhusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadhusuthuthu|dhadhusuthuthu]] || [[word:dhadhusujuju|dhadhusujuju]] || [[word:dhadhusushushu|dhadhusushushu]] || [[word:dhadhusuku|dhadhusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadhusuthun|dhadhusuthun]] || [[word:dhadhusujun|dhadhusujun]] || [[word:dhadhusushun|dhadhusushun]] || [[word:dhadhusukun|dhadhusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadhusuthuoro|dhadhusuthuoro]] || [[word:dhadhusujuoro|dhadhusujuoro]] || [[word:dhadhusushuoro|dhadhusushuoro]] || [[word:dhadhusukuoro|dhadhusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
